resources.string: Settings
Calculator
Tap here to enter Settings

R47 always restores your last session in private app storage.
You can set a single Work Directory for portable PROGRAMS, SAVFILES, SCREENS, and STATE files.
Enter Settings to start using your R47 calculator.
Session Restore Storage
Private app storage managed by Android. Restores your last session on restart.

R47 restores your running session from Android private app storage at:
%1$s
This app-managed location is separate from the optional external Work Directory. The Work Directory is only for portable STATE, PROGRAMS, SAVFILES, and SCREENS files opened or created through Android\'s document browser.
Work Directory Set
Open and save will start in %1$s. R47 will create portable STATE, PROGRAMS, SAVFILES, and SCREENS folders here as needed. Session restore stays in private app storage.
Set Work Directory

The Work Directory is optional. Set a custom external folder only if you want READP, portable STATE files, manual saves, and screenshots to start in one place.
Use Android Default Folder to forget the saved Work Directory and return future open and save actions to Android\'s last-used folder.
Set Work Directory
Use Android Default Folder
Optional. Session restore stays in private app storage. Open and save start in Android\'s last-used folder until you choose a Work Directory.
Using %1$s for portable STATE, PROGRAMS, SAVFILES, and SCREENS files. Session restore still stays in private app storage.
The saved Work Directory is no longer accessible. Set a new folder or use Android\'s default folder.
the saved folder
View GNU GPL v3 Notice
Shows the packaged GPL v3 text and source-delivery guidance for this build
View Android Source Repository
Public source repository for this Android build
View Bundled Native and Vendored Notices
Shows repo-owned notices for vendored or native surfaces that do not come from Maven metadata
View Android Library Notices
Shows notices collected from Android runtime dependency POM metadata
View SPDX Inventory
Shows the packaged machine-readable third-party inventory
Visit Upstream C47 Project Page
LCD Luminance
Adjust the LCD tone while preserving the selected hue
This build could not read the packaged GNU GPL text from the APK.
Bundled Native and Vendored Notices
This build could not read the packaged repo notice index from the APK.
This build could not read the selected packaged notice from the APK.
Packaged Notice

R47 Android is licensed under the GNU General Public License, version 3.
This program comes with ABSOLUTELY NO WARRANTY.
A verbatim copy of the GPL is packaged in this APK below.
Distributors of APKs must also provide the exact corresponding source for the build they ship. Use the Android source repository entry in Settings to reach the public Android fork for this build. The packaged SOURCE manifest also records the synchronized upstream core revision when the build provides one.
Close
